work_unit: 聚合ai客服开发/ApiServer CSRF hardening (OMNICS-API-01)
situation: audit-2026-07-05-013 finding OMNICS-API-01 (HIGH): ApiServer.ts CORS origin:true + host 0.0.0.0 + onRequest Token 校验注释掉 → 任意网站经浏览器 fetch http://127.0.0.1:12345 可 POST /shops/:id/send 发任意客服话术(钓鱼/诈骗) + 投毒/删知识库 + 读聊天历史. 派生 fix #1 of 11 pending.
action: 最小修复 ApiServer.ts 单文件: (1) CORS origin:true→false (禁跨域, Electron renderer 走 file:///IPC 不走此 HTTP API); (2) onRequest hook 取消注释并强制 Bearer token 校验(包括 localhost), 移除 127.0.0.1/::1 豁免; (3) listen host '0.0.0.0'→'127.0.0.1' (仅回环). opt-worktree.sh 判 direction_kind=route-fix (ApiServer.ts 不在 public-interfaces.txt), 新 area 'omnics' 开新 worktree opt-omnics-1783246236.
outcome_evidence: commit 357a7ed on auto/opt-omnics-1783246236 (base=85bd9e1=master HEAD, FF-clean); git show --stat confirms 1 file / 38+/41- lines; x-tool external-fork push 403 precedent → stack preserved on disk+origin awaiting human merge to master.
next_suggestion: 下一轮派生 OMNICS-SIDECAR-01 (HIGH, qianfan_driver.py FastAPI 全端点无鉴权, priority #2); 然后 OMNICS-LLM-01 (MED prompt injection), OMNICS-LLM-02 (MED deceptive systemPrompt). 全 11 pending 派完等 3 轮 wait timeout 或人工 merge.

audit_findings.finding: OMNICS-API-01: CORS origin:true + host 0.0.0.0 + Token 校验注释掉 → 浏览器 CSRF 到 localhost:12345 可发任意客服话术/投毒KB/读历史
audit_findings.remediation: CORS origin:false + 强制 Bearer token (含 localhost) + bind 127.0.0.1
